provenance: WorldBible §9: 'Phorys — Reman mineral. Mixed with liquid, converts liquid to pressurized gas. Powers the Devastator cannons and Revlin's flame bow.' Expansion 240 is the ARCHITECTURE.md §10 sibling-file number. NO-WEAR ruling (Eli, 2026-07-12): phorys is inexhaustible in v0 — wear fields removed; the loader treats absent wear as no wear-out. Revisit if a resource-economy hook is wanted post-v0.
notes: Field semantics. trigger: FluidSystem's REAGENT sub-phase consumes the contacting fluid units in its own lane (any fluid whose raw carries tag 'liquid'; matching is by tag, not id) and emits ReagentContactEvent(cell, fluidId, units, solidId); PhorysReactionSystem (REACTIONS phase, after THERMAL) consumes it same tick. expansion: gas volume factor — PressurePulseEvent.magnitude = unitsConsumed * expansion (240 gas-units per liquid unit). Max liquid contact per cell per tick is depth 7, so magnitude <= 7 * 240 = 1680 = pulse.magnitudeCap; loader validates cap fits 16 bits and clamps. pulse.gasId: null in v0 — there is no gas fluid in the canonical vocabulary; the pulse carries pressure only and FluidSystem applies it next tick (documented canon latency, event table §5) as displacement/wake input; steam/aether gas is a post-v0 seam. Wear: none in v0 per Eli's no-wear ruling — PhorysReactionSystem keeps no wear counter and the tile never spends; the wear* field family remains reserved (optional) in the reaction schema for post-v0.
